finding_results.notes: Rebuilt money choreography into a single explicit ledger: tow shortfall is paid separately, Cora fronts a 137 repair deposit, shift pay repays Cora, and remaining repair balance is stated as 308 against the 445 estimate.
Added explicit transfer admission with amount and converted end-state from withheld draft to an irreversible sent message.
Replaced touchscreen-coded descriptors with unambiguous prepaid flip-phone physical details (hinge, outer screen, snap-open form, tiny inner display).
Replaced abstract confession gloss with direct admission naming actor, amount, and victimized account; Cora responds with a concrete boundary and consequence.
Converted summarized swearing into explicit spoken panic language directly attached to the pull-over action.
Compressed the doubled suppression chain into one suppression beat, then forced scene consequence through immediate spoken admission and leverage shift.
Retained a single anchored 'landed like' construction and introduced no additional instances in the chapter.
Adjusted Eli's pressured diner response to contraction-forward colloquial register while preserving meaning.

summary: Implemented all eight structural/craft fixes in chapter_03: corrected cash/repair causality ledger, aligned phone continuity to prepaid flip-phone canon, replaced abstraction with explicit accountability dialogue, restored pressure-true speech beats, preserved the single canonical formula-metaphor instance, and closed on irreversible communication instead of withheld truth.
